sentences.target: Je suis sujet aux rhumes l'hiver.

translations.fr: Je suis sujet aux rhumes l'hiver.
translations.en: I’m prone to colds in winter.
translations.es: En invierno me resfrío con facilidad.
translations.de: Ich bin im Winter anfällig für Erkältungen.
translations.pt: No inverno eu pego resfriados com facilidade.
translations.vi: Tôi hay bị cảm vào mùa đông.
translations.nl: In de winter vat ik snel kou.
translations.hi: सर्दियों में मुझे आसानी से जुकाम हो जाता है.
translations.nb: Om vinteren blir jeg lett forkjølet.
translations.id: Saya mudah terkena pilek di musim dingin.
translations.sv: På vintern blir jag lätt förkyld.
translations.da: Om vinteren bliver jeg let forkølet.
translations.ja: 冬は風邪をひきやすいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Copular verb, present indicative 1st singular, linking the subject to the predicative adjective.
Predicative adjective, masculine singular; used in the set phrase 'sujet à' meaning 'prone to'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' and plural definite article 'les'; introduces the plural complement.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition ('aux rhumes').
Elided definite article before vowel-initial noun.
Common noun; with the article forms a nominal temporal complement ('l'hiver' = in winter).

sentences.target: Tu es sujette aux allergies au printemps.
sentences.reading: /ty ɛ syʒɛt oz alɛʁʒi o pʁɛ̃tɑ̃/

translations.fr: Tu es sujette aux allergies au printemps.
translations.ipa: /ty ɛ syʒɛt oz alɛʁʒi o pʁɛ̃tɑ̃/
translations.en: You’re prone to allergies in spring.
translations.es: En primavera eres propensa a las alergias.
translations.de: Im Frühling bist du anfällig für Allergien.
translations.it: In primavera sei soggetta ad allergie.
translations.pt: Na primavera, você é propensa a alergias.
translations.vi: Vào mùa xuân bạn dễ bị dị ứng.
translations.nl: In het voorjaar ben je vatbaar voor allergieën.
translations.hi: वसंत में तुम्हें एलर्जी होने की प्रवृत्ति है.
translations.el: Την άνοιξη είσαι επιρρεπής σε αλλεργίες.
translations.nb: Om våren er du utsatt for allergier.
translations.id: Di musim semi kamu rentan terhadap alergi.
translations.sv: På våren får du lätt allergi.
translations.cs: Na jaře jsi náchylná k alergiím.
translations.da: Om foråret er du tilbøjelig til allergi.
translations.ja: 春はアレルギーを起こしやすいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Copular verb, present indicative 2nd singular.
Predicative adjective, feminine singular (inflected form of 'sujet'); agrees with the subject.
Contraction of 'à' + plural article 'les'; introduces the complement ('allergies').
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition.
Contraction of 'à' + singular definite article 'le'; introduces the temporal noun.
Common noun; with 'au' forms a temporal adverbial ('au printemps' = in the spring).

sentences.target: Ils sont sujets au stress au travail.
sentences.reading: /il sɔ̃ syʒɛ o stʁɛs o tʁavaj/

translations.fr: Ils sont sujets au stress au travail.
translations.ipa: /il sɔ̃ syʒɛ o stʁɛs o tʁavaj/
translations.en: They are prone to stress at work.
translations.es: En el trabajo son propensos al estrés.
translations.de: Bei der Arbeit sind sie anfällig für Stress.
translations.it: Al lavoro sono soggetti allo stress.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在工作中容易感到压力。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺工作時好容易有壓力。
translations.ru: На работе они склонны к стрессу.
translations.pt: No trabalho, eles são propensos ao estresse.
translations.vi: Họ dễ bị căng thẳng khi làm việc.
translations.nl: Op het werk zijn ze gevoelig voor stress.
translations.uk: На роботі вони схильні до стресу.
translations.hi: काम पर उन्हें आसानी से तनाव हो जाता है.
translations.pl: W pracy są podatni na stres.
translations.el: Στη δουλειά είναι επιρρεπείς στο άγχος.
translations.nb: På jobb er de utsatt for stress.
translations.id: Di tempat kerja mereka rentan terhadap stres.
translations.sv: På jobbet är de benägna att bli stressade.
translations.ro: La serviciu sunt predispuși la stres.
translations.cs: V práci jsou náchylní ke stresu.
translations.da: På arbejdet er de udsat for stress.
translations.ja: 彼らは職場でストレスを感じやすいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed group).
Copular verb, present indicative 3rd plural.
Predicative adjective, masculine plural; agrees with the subject; part of the expression 'sujet à'.
Contraction of 'à' + singular definite article 'le'; introduces the complement ('stress').
Common noun; object of the preposition.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; introduces the location noun.
Common noun; with 'au' forms an adverbial PP ('au travail' = at work).

sentences.target: La machine est sujette aux pannes.

translations.fr: La machine est sujette aux pannes.
translations.en: The machine is prone to breakdowns.
translations.es: La máquina es propensa a averías.
translations.it: La macchina è soggetta a guasti.
translations.pt: A máquina é propensa a avarias.
translations.hi: यह मशीन बार-बार खराब होती है.
translations.el: Το μηχάνημα είναι επιρρεπές σε βλάβες.
translations.ja: その機械は故障しがちです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular verb, present indicative 3rd singular.
Predicative adjective, feminine singular; agrees with 'la machine'.
Contraction of 'à' + plural definite article 'les'; introduces the plural complement.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition.

Ils sont sujets au stress au travail.
La machine est sujette aux pannes.

en: I’m prone to colds in winter.
You’re prone to allergies in spring.
They are prone to stress at work.
The machine is prone to breakdowns.
